proofs: intros a b Hle. assert (Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)).

goals.goal: isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

hypotheses: Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

attempts: intros x1 x2 Hle. set (X := fun d => d = x1 \/ d = x2). assert (Hdir : isDirected X) by (unfold isDirected; intros a b Ha Hb; unfold X in Ha, Hb; destruct Ha as [->|->]; destruct Hb as [->|->]; exists x2; split; [right; reflexivity | split; [exact Hle | apply (PreOrder_Reflexive leProp_PreOrder x2)]]). destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM X Hdir) as [sup_X [sup_Y [Hsup_X [Hsup_img Heq]]]]. assert (Hsup_x2 : is_supremum_of x2 X) by (split; [intros d [->| ->]; [exact Hle | apply (PreOrder_Reflexive leProp_PreOrder x2)] | intros y Hy; apply Hy; right; reflexivity]). destruct Hsup_X as [Hsup_X_upper Hsup_X_min], Hsup_x2 as [Hsup_x2_upper Hsup_x2_min]. assert (HsupX_eq_x2 : eqProp sup_X x2) by (apply (partial_order_antisym leProp_PartialOrder sup_X x2); [apply (Hsup_X_min x2 Hsup_x2_upper) | apply (Hsup_x2_min sup_X Hsup_X_upper)]). destruct (COMPAT_WITH_eqProp sup_X x2 HsupX_eq_x2) as [HfsupX_le_fx2 Hfx2_le_fsupX], Heq as [HfsupX_le_supY HsupY_le_fsupX], Hsup_img as [Hsup_img_upper Hsup_img_min]. exact (PreOrder_Transitive leProp_PreOrder (f x1) sup_Y (f x2) (Hsup_img_upper (f x1) (ex_intro (fun x => X x /\ f x = f x1) x1 (conj (or_introl eq_refl) eq_refl))) (PreOrder_Transitive leProp_PreOrder sup_Y (f sup_X) (f x2) HsupY_le_fsupX HfsupX_le_fx2)).

unfold isMonotonic1; intros x1 x2 Hle. pose proof (leProp_PreOrder PROSET) as HPreD; destruct HPreD as [HreflD HtransD]. pose proof (leProp_PreOrder PROSET') as HPreD'; destruct HPreD' as [HreflD' HtransD']. pose proof (leProp_PartialOrder PROSET) as HPartialD. pose proof (leProp_PartialOrder PROSET') as HPartialD'. set (X := fun x : D => x = x1 \/ x = x2). assert (Hdir : isDirected X). unfold isDirected; split.
- exists x1; left; reflexivity.
- intros a b Ha Hb. destruct Ha as [Ha1 | Ha2]; destruct Hb as [Hb1 | Hb2]; subst.
-- exists x2; split; [right; reflexivity | split; [exact Hle | exact (HreflD x2)]].
-- exists x2; split; [right; reflexivity | split; [exact Hle | exact (HreflD x2)]].
-- exists x2; split; [right; reflexivity | split; [exact Hle | exact (HreflD x2)]].
-- exists x2; split; [right; reflexivity | split; [exact (HreflD x2) | exact (HreflD x2)]]. destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM X Hdir) as [sup_X [sup_Y [Hsup_X [Hsup_Y Heq]]]]. destruct Hsup_X as [Hupper_X Hleast_X]; destruct Hsup_Y as [Hupper_Y Hleast_Y]. assert (Hx1_sup_X : leProp x1 sup_X) := Hupper_X x1 (or_introl eq_refl). assert (Hx2_sup_X : leProp x2 sup_X) := Hupper_X x2 (or_intror eq_refl). assert (Hx2_upper : forall x, X x -> leProp x x2). intros x [Hx | Hx]; subst; [exact Hle | exact (HreflD x2)]. assert (Hsup_X_le_x2 : leProp sup_X x2) := Hleast_X x2 Hx2_upper. assert (Heq_sup_X_x2 : eqProp sup_X x2). destruct (HPartialD sup_X x2) as [Hiff _]; apply Hiff; split; [exact Hsup_X_le_x2 | exact Hx2_sup_X]. assert (Hcompat := COMPAT_WITH_eqProp); unfold eqPropCompatible1 in Hcompat. assert (Heq_f_sup_X_f_x2 : eqProp (f sup_X) (f x2)). apply Hcompat with (x1 := sup_X) (x2 := x2); exact Heq_sup_X_x2. destruct (HPartialD' (f sup_X) sup_Y) as [Hiff_sup _]; destruct (Hiff_sup Heq) as [Hle_fsup_supY Hle_supY_fsup]. destruct (HPartialD' (f sup_X) (f x2)) as [Hiff_fx2 _]; destruct (Hiff_fx2 Heq_f_sup_X_f_x2) as [Hle_fsup_fx2 Hle_fx2_fsup]. assert (Hle_supY_fx2 : leProp sup_Y (f x2)). apply (HtransD' sup_Y (f sup_X) (f x2)); [exact Hle_supY_fsup | exact Hle_fsup_fx2]. assert (Hin_image : E.image f X (f x1)). unfold E.image; exists x1; split; [exact (or_introl eq_refl) | reflexivity]. assert (Hle_fx1_supY : leProp (f x1) sup_Y) := Hupper_Y (f x1) Hin_image. apply (HtransD' (f x1) sup_Y (f x2)); [exact Hle_fx1_supY | exact Hle_supY_fx2].

unfold isMonotonic1; intros x1 x2 Hle. pose proof (leProp_PreOrder PROSET) as HPreD; destruct HPreD as [HreflD HtransD]. pose proof (leProp_PreOrder PROSET') as HPreD'; destruct HPreD' as [HreflD' HtransD']. pose proof (leProp_PartialOrder PROSET) as HPartialD. pose proof (leProp_PartialOrder PROSET') as HPartialD'. set (X := fun x : D => x = x1 \/ x = x2). assert (Hdir : isDirected X). unfold isDirected; split.

obligation.goal: isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

proofs: intros a b Hle. assert (Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)).

goals.goal: isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

hypotheses: Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

value.proof_prefix: intros a b Hle. assert (Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)).

hypotheses: Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

proofs: intros a b Hle. assert (Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)).

goals.goal: isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

hypotheses: Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)

value.proof_prefix: intros a b Hle. assert (Hdir : isDirected (fun x : D => leProp x b)). admit.

attempts: destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [s [t [[Hs1 Hs2] [Ht1 Ht2] Heq]]]. assert (Hsup_b : is_supremum_of b (fun x : D => leProp x b)) by (split; [ exact (fun x Hx => Hx) | intros u Hu; apply Hu; apply (PreOrder_Reflexive (leProp_PreOrder PROSET) b) ]). assert (Heq_s : eqProp s b) by (apply (leProp_PartialOrder PROSET s b); [ exact (Hs2 b (fun x Hx => Hx)) | exact (proj2 Hsup_b s (fun x Hx => Hs1 x Hx)) ]). assert (Hfb_eq_t : eqProp (f b) t) by (transitivity (f s); [ symmetry; apply (COMPAT_WITH_eqProp s b Heq_s) | exact Heq ]). assert (Hfa_image : E.In (E.image f (fun x : D => leProp x b)) (f a)) by (exists a; split; [ exact Hle | reflexivity ]). destruct Hfb_eq_t as [Hle_fb_t Hle_t_fb]. apply (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder PROSET') (f a) t (f b)); [ exact (Ht1 (f a) Hfa_image) | exact Hle_t_fb ].

destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [sup_X [sup_Y [H_sup_X [H_sup_image Heq]]]]. assert (H_sup_b : is_supremum_of b (fun x : D => leProp x b)) by
  (split; [exact (fun x hx => hx) | exact (fun u hu => hu b (PreOrder_Reflexive leProp_PreOrder b))]). destruct H_sup_b as [Hub_b Lst_b], H_sup_X as [Hub_X Lst_X], H_sup_image as [Hub_img Lst_img]. assert (eq_sup_Y_f_b : eqProp sup_Y (f b)) by
  (transitivity (f sup_X); [symmetry; exact Heq | exact (COMPAT_WITH_eqProp sup_X b (proj1 (leProp_PartialOrder sup_X b) (conj (Lst_X b Hub_b) (Lst_b sup_X Hub_X))))]). assert (le_f_a_sup_Y : leProp (f a) sup_Y) by
  (apply Hub_img (f a); eexists a; split; [exact Hle | reflexivity]). apply (PreOrder_Transitive leProp_PreOrder (f a) sup_Y (f b) le_f_a_sup_Y (proj1 (proj2 (leProp_PartialOrder sup_Y (f b)) eq_sup_Y_f_b))).

destruct leProp_PreOrder as [Hrefl Htrans]. destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [sup_X [sup_Y [[HsupX_upper HsupX_least] [[HsupY_upper HsupY_least] [Heq1 Heq2]]]]]. assert (Hle_b_supX : leProp b sup_X) by (apply HsupX_upper; exact (Hrefl b)). assert (Hle_supX_b : leProp sup_X b) by (apply HsupX_least; intros y Hy; exact Hy). assert (Heq_supX_b : eqProp sup_X b) by (apply leProp_PartialOrder; [exact Hle_supX_b | exact Hle_b_supX]). assert (Hle_fsupX_fb : leProp (f sup_X) (f b)) by (destruct (COMPAT_WITH_eqProp sup_X b Heq_supX_b) as [l _]; exact l). assert (Hle_fa_supY : leProp (f a) sup_Y) by (apply HsupY_upper; (unfold E.image, E.In; exists a; split; [exact Hle | split; apply Hrefl])). apply Htrans with sup_Y; [exact Hle_fa_supY | apply Htrans with (f sup_X); [exact Heq2 | exact Hle_fsupX_fb]].

destruct leProp_PreOrder as [Hrefl Htrans], leProp_PartialOrder as [antisym eq_implies_le]. destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [sx [sy [[Usx Lsx] [Usy Lsy] Heq]]]. assert (Hbx : E.In b (fun x : D => leProp x b)) by apply Hrefl. assert (eq_sx_b : eqProp sx b) by (apply antisym; split; [apply Usx, Hbx | apply Lsx; intros x Hx; exact Hx]). assert (eq_sy_fb : eqProp sy (f b)) by (transitivity (f sx); [exact Heq | apply COMPAT_WITH_eqProp; exact eq_sx_b]). assert (Hfa_sy : leProp (f a) sy) by (apply Usy; apply E.image_intro with a; [exact Hle | reflexivity]). apply (Htrans (f a) sy (f b) Hfa_sy (proj1 (eq_implies_le sy (f b) eq_sy_fb))).

pose (X := fun x : D => leProp x b). destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM X Hdir) as (sup_X, (sup_Y, (Hsup_X, (Hsup_Y, Heq)))). destruct Hsup_X as [Hsup_X_ub Hsup_X_least], Hsup_Y as [Hsup_Y_ub Hsup_Y_least]. have b_in_X : E.In b X := (leProp_PreOrder D PROSET).(PreOrder_Reflexive) b. have eq_supY_fb : eqProp sup_Y (f b) :=
  let E' := leProp_PartialOrder D' PROSET' in
  let E := leProp_PartialOrder D PROSET in
  transitivity (f sup_X);
    [ apply (Equivalence_Symmetric _ (partial_order_equivalence E') _ _ Heq)
    | apply COMPAT_WITH_eqProp;
        apply (partial_order_antisymmetry E) sup_X b
          (Hsup_X_least b (fun x Hx => Hx))
          (Hsup_X_ub b b_in_X) ]. have supY_le_fb : leProp sup_Y (f b) :=
  eqProp_leProp D' PROSET' sup_Y (f b) eq_supY_fb. have fa_in_image : E.In (f a) (E.image f X) :=
  ex_intro (fun x : D => E.In x X /\ eqProp (f a) (f x)) a
    (conj Hle ((leProp_PartialOrder D' PROSET').(partial_order_equivalence).(Equivalence_Reflexive) (f a))). eapply PreOrder_Transitive;
  [ apply (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET')
  | apply Hsup_Y_ub; exact fa_in_image
  | exact supY_le_fb ].
failed_attempts: destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [s [t [[Hs1 Hs2] [Ht1 Ht2] Heq]]]. assert (Hsup_b : is_supremum_of b (fun x : D => leProp x b)) by (split; [ exact (fun x Hx => Hx) | intros u Hu; apply Hu; apply (PreOrder_Reflexive (leProp_PreOrder PROSET) b) ]). assert (Heq_s : eqProp s b) by (apply (leProp_PartialOrder PROSET s b); [ exact (Hs2 b (fun x Hx => Hx)) | exact (proj2 Hsup_b s (fun x Hx => Hs1 x Hx)) ]). assert (Hfb_eq_t : eqProp (f b) t) by (transitivity (f s); [ symmetry; apply (COMPAT_WITH_eqProp s b Heq_s) | exact Heq ]). assert (Hfa_image : E.In (E.image f (fun x : D => leProp x b)) (f a)) by (exists a; split; [ exact Hle | reflexivity ]). destruct Hfb_eq_t as [Hle_fb_t Hle_t_fb]. apply (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder PROSET') (f a) t (f b)); [ exact (Ht1 (f a) Hfa_image) | exact Hle_t_fb ].

destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [sup_X [sup_Y [H_sup_X [H_sup_image Heq]]]]. assert (H_sup_b : is_supremum_of b (fun x : D => leProp x b)) by
  (split; [exact (fun x hx => hx) | exact (fun u hu => hu b (PreOrder_Reflexive leProp_PreOrder b))]). destruct H_sup_b as [Hub_b Lst_b], H_sup_X as [Hub_X Lst_X], H_sup_image as [Hub_img Lst_img]. assert (eq_sup_Y_f_b : eqProp sup_Y (f b)) by
  (transitivity (f sup_X); [symmetry; exact Heq | exact (COMPAT_WITH_eqProp sup_X b (proj1 (leProp_PartialOrder sup_X b) (conj (Lst_X b Hub_b) (Lst_b sup_X Hub_X))))]). assert (le_f_a_sup_Y : leProp (f a) sup_Y) by
  (apply Hub_img (f a); eexists a; split; [exact Hle | reflexivity]). apply (PreOrder_Transitive leProp_PreOrder (f a) sup_Y (f b) le_f_a_sup_Y (proj1 (proj2 (leProp_PartialOrder sup_Y (f b)) eq_sup_Y_f_b))).

destruct leProp_PreOrder as [Hrefl Htrans]. destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [sup_X [sup_Y [[HsupX_upper HsupX_least] [[HsupY_upper HsupY_least] [Heq1 Heq2]]]]]. assert (Hle_b_supX : leProp b sup_X) by (apply HsupX_upper; exact (Hrefl b)). assert (Hle_supX_b : leProp sup_X b) by (apply HsupX_least; intros y Hy; exact Hy). assert (Heq_supX_b : eqProp sup_X b) by (apply leProp_PartialOrder; [exact Hle_supX_b | exact Hle_b_supX]). assert (Hle_fsupX_fb : leProp (f sup_X) (f b)) by (destruct (COMPAT_WITH_eqProp sup_X b Heq_supX_b) as [l _]; exact l). assert (Hle_fa_supY : leProp (f a) sup_Y) by (apply HsupY_upper; (unfold E.image, E.In; exists a; split; [exact Hle | split; apply Hrefl])). apply Htrans with sup_Y; [exact Hle_fa_supY | apply Htrans with (f sup_X); [exact Heq2 | exact Hle_fsupX_fb]].

destruct leProp_PreOrder as [Hrefl Htrans], leProp_PartialOrder as [antisym eq_implies_le]. destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM (fun x : D => leProp x b) Hdir) as [sx [sy [[Usx Lsx] [Usy Lsy] Heq]]]. assert (Hbx : E.In b (fun x : D => leProp x b)) by apply Hrefl. assert (eq_sx_b : eqProp sx b) by (apply antisym; split; [apply Usx, Hbx | apply Lsx; intros x Hx; exact Hx]). assert (eq_sy_fb : eqProp sy (f b)) by (transitivity (f sx); [exact Heq | apply COMPAT_WITH_eqProp; exact eq_sx_b]). assert (Hfa_sy : leProp (f a) sy) by (apply Usy; apply E.image_intro with a; [exact Hle | reflexivity]). apply (Htrans (f a) sy (f b) Hfa_sy (proj1 (eq_implies_le sy (f b) eq_sy_fb))).

pose (X := fun x : D => leProp x b). destruct (PRESERVES_SUPREMUM X Hdir) as (sup_X, (sup_Y, (Hsup_X, (Hsup_Y, Heq)))). destruct Hsup_X as [Hsup_X_ub Hsup_X_least], Hsup_Y as [Hsup_Y_ub Hsup_Y_least]. have b_in_X : E.In b X := (leProp_PreOrder D PROSET).(PreOrder_Reflexive) b. have eq_supY_fb : eqProp sup_Y (f b) :=
  let E' := leProp_PartialOrder D' PROSET' in
  let E := leProp_PartialOrder D PROSET in
  transitivity (f sup_X);
    [ apply (Equivalence_Symmetric _ (partial_order_equivalence E') _ _ Heq)
    | apply COMPAT_WITH_eqProp;
        apply (partial_order_antisymmetry E) sup_X b
          (Hsup_X_least b (fun x Hx => Hx))
          (Hsup_X_ub b b_in_X) ]. have supY_le_fb : leProp sup_Y (f b) :=
  eqProp_leProp D' PROSET' sup_Y (f b) eq_supY_fb. have fa_in_image : E.In (f a) (E.image f X) :=
  ex_intro (fun x : D => E.In x X /\ eqProp (f a) (f x)) a
    (conj Hle ((leProp_PartialOrder D' PROSET').(partial_order_equivalence).(Equivalence_Reflexive) (f a))). eapply PreOrder_Transitive;
  [ apply (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET')
  | apply Hsup_Y_ub; exact fa_in_image
  | exact supY_le_fb ].
